items.title: England legend urges Thomas Tuchel to make controversial Jude Bellingham tactical change in England World Cup XI
items.summary: ENGLAND legend Joe Cole reckons it may not have to be a case of Jude Bellingham OR Morgan Rogers at the World Cup. items.title: Palmer left with cruel reminder of drastic loss of form as old pal Rogers in line to START over Bellingham at World Cup
items.summary: COLE PALMER will be appearing on your screens during the World Cup — but only in a new Nike video. items.title: England World Cup ticket prices plummet by almost half as Fifa finally put 1000s of unsold seats on the market
items.summary: ENGLAND World Cup ticket prices have plummeted by almost half – as Fifa finally put thousands of withheld seats on the market.  Industry insiders now expect tickets to dip below £200 by matchdays - sparking a last-minute rush.  Greedy Fifa chiefs held back blocks of seating to keep prices

items.title: ‘Story is meant to continue’ – Tony Mowbray, 62, named new boss of EFL giants in first job after cancer fight
items.summary: BLACKBURN ROVERS have appointed Tony Mowbray as their new manager for the second time. Rovers went down to League One and then won promotion back to the Championship during Mowbray's first stint in the dugout between 2017 and 2022.
